Talk to your n8n instance and trigger automations - search for workflows, get their details, and execute them directly from Claude.  
  
You can use n8n connector to:  
  
List all your workflows:  
“What workflows do I have on my n8n instance?”  
  
Search for a specific action:  
“Do I have an automation for creating and publishing posts on my social media handles?”  
  
Execute your workflows:  
"Ask my n8n personal assistant to give me a summary of my meetings from yesterday"   
"Check my calendar and book me in for my tennis classes on Friday afternoon"
